name: Chocolate Angel Food Cake 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees F.
2. In a medium bowl, sift together the flour, cocoa, and 1/2 cup sugar. Sift the mixture twice more.
3. Set aside.
4. In a large bowl, beat the egg whites until soft peaks form. Gradually add the cream of tartar and salt, beating to soft stiff peaks.
5. Gradually add the remaining sugar, 1 tablespoon at a time, until stiff peaks form.
6. Gently fold in the sifted flour mixture and vanilla.
7. Pour the batter into an ungreased tube pan.
8. Bake for 55 to 65 minutes, or until set.
9. Invert the pan for about 1 hour, or until the cake is completely cool.
